---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

Describe the feature concisely. What problem does it solve, or what capability
is missing?

## Motivation

Why is this feature valuable? How would it improve the workflow?

## Proposed Solution

How would you like the feature to work? Provide an example or pseudo-code if
helpful.

## Alternatives Considered

Are there existing features or workarounds that partially address this?

## Additional Context

Any other relevant details (tool versions, use cases, etc.).
